description_long: This is a robust, military green toolbox with a rectangular, hard-shell exterior and reinforced edges. The lid is hinged and opens to reveal a foam-lined interior with a large main compartment and a smaller, inset section for organizing tools or equipment. The exterior features molded handles for carrying and several visible latches for secure closure. The surface is matte and slightly textured, likely to provide grip and resist scratches. The box appears to be constructed primarily from heavy-duty plastic, with metal components for the hinges and latches. There are no visible brand logos or external labels, giving it a utilitarian, unbranded appearance.
description: A sturdy, green, hard-shell toolbox with a foam-lined interior, molded handles, and secure latches. It features a large main compartment and a smaller inset section for tool organization.
description_view_0: Front and top view showing the open lid, foam-lined interior, and main compartment with a smaller inset section.
description_view_1: Rear and top view with the lid open, highlighting the hinge mechanism and the full depth of the main compartment.
description_view_2: Side view showing the closed lid on one half and the open lid on the other, emphasizing the box's thickness and solid construction.
description_view_3: Top-down view into the open box, clearly displaying the foam lining and compartment layout.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, molded plastic handles integrated into the sides of the box; fixed and ergonomic for carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Plastic clasp latches on the front and sides, snap-type, with no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: One large main compartment with a foam insert and a smaller, fixed inset section for organizing smaller items; no removable trays or external compartments visible.
